name: Potato Ratatouille
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Peeled and chopped tomatoes (or 1 32 oz. can)
1 tablespoon Fresh basil, chopped (or 1/2 teaspoon dried)
1 tablespoon Fresh oregano, chopped (or 1.2 teaspoons dried)
2 tablespoons Fresh parsley, chopped (or 1 tablespoon dried)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place onions and garlic in a large pot with water.
2. Cook and stir for about 3 minutes.
3. Add the remaining ingredients, except pepper, to the pot.
4. Cover and cook over medium heat for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Season with pepper before serving.
